_source: Conformance evidence — the gate verdicts this site GENUINELY verifies, fed into lone's conformance() model (the report at /conformance + dist/api/v1/conformance.json). Each entry below is RE-PROVEN on every build by a named gate that BLOCKS on failure, so this declaration cannot drift from reality without turning CI red — the same discipline as the structure-audit baseline and data/audit/*. build.mjs merges this contract UNDER its own in-process build-facts (content-digests / ai-readability / feeds, which it self-checks), and a deploy/CI step MAY override any field with a live-captured value via $CONFORMANCE_EVIDENCE / $CONFORMANCE_LONE_FINDINGS. HONEST BY CONSTRUCTION: the strong WCAG 2.2 AA / OWASP ASVS compact claim stays WITHHELD — the manual + external GATING criteria that no build-time tool can prove (manual WCAG audit, OWASP ASVS L2, Core Web Vitals p75 field data, runtime reliability) are deliberately NOT asserted here, so they report not-assessed and the claim is partial. RE-PROVEN by build-time gates: the known-vuln scan (scripts/vuln-gate.mjs, production-scoped npm audit), the axe serious/critical scan (scripts/axe-gate.mjs, axe-core in jsdom — color-contrast deferred to lone's static validator), the Nu HTML Checker (scripts/html-validator-gate.mjs, vnu over the built pages), and Baseline availability (scripts/baseline-gate.mjs, stylelint-plugin-use-baseline over the shipped CSS — MEASURED 'widely': :has() and ::selection are each @supports-guarded progressive enhancements, so every shipped feature is Baseline Widely Available). Still WITHHELD because no build-time tool proves them: manual WCAG audit, OWASP ASVS L2, Core Web Vitals p75 field data, runtime reliability.

_gates.loneFindings: semantic.yml — `deno run gates/semantic/gate.ts` blesses each rendered DOM with lone; 0 error-severity findings (empty array) = the lone-measurable tier-1 criteria (HTML author / WAI-ARIA / WCAG-automatable) + the cognitive interface-complexity budget are met. The deploy/semantic job may inject the real findings via $CONFORMANCE_LONE_FINDINGS.
_gates.jsonLdShacl: shacl.yml / `npm run check:shacl` — shacl-runner reports conforms:true, 0 violating blocks.
_gates.seoTechnical: seo.yml / `npm run check:seo` — seo-gate passes: self-consistent canonicals, unique titles, RFC 9309 robots.txt, resolving sitemap, 0 broken internal links.
_gates.sbom: `npm run check:sbom` — SPDX-2.3 well-formed + complete (pinned set ⊆ SBOM ⊆ pinned set); keyless-signed in deploy.yml (cosign sign-blob → Sigstore bundle).
_gates.slsaProvenance: gen-attestation.mjs emits the in-toto/SLSA statement; deploy.yml keyless-signs it and the post-deploy verify step (verify/verify.mjs + cosign verify-blob) verifies it against the served artifact.
_gates.signedReleaseManifest: gen-sitemanifest.mjs (deploy) content-addresses the whole site to site.sha256; deploy.yml keyless-signs it.
_gates.ipfsCid: generators/gen-cid.mjs records the CIDv1 of the served site in provenance.json (contentAddress.ipfs.cid).
_gates.contentDigests: build.mjs writes RFC 9530 Repr-Digest headers into dist/_headers (also self-checked in-process).
_gates.reproducibleBuild: build.mjs is a pure, hermetic function of the contracts + the flake.lock-pinned toolchain + brand submodule — same inputs, same bytes (nix build .#site).
_gates.vulns: scripts/vuln-gate.mjs --check — `npm audit --omit=dev` over the SHIPPED dependency set (this static site has zero runtime deps, so production-scope = the deployed bytes) reports 0 known critical/high; blocks if a newly-disclosed prod critical/high exceeds the committed count. The build toolchain's own advisories are tracked separately by `npm run audit`.
_gates.axe: scripts/axe-gate.mjs --check (conformance.yml) — axe-core injected into jsdom (headless, no browser) over every built page reports 0 serious/critical violations; blocks on regression. jsdom cannot lay out or paint, so the rules that need rendering (color-contrast above all) are DISABLED here and covered instead by lone's static color_contrast validator under a11y.wcag22-aa-auto.
_gates.htmlValidator: scripts/html-validator-gate.mjs --check (conformance.yml) — the Nu HTML Checker (vnu, run as a self-contained Java jar via the vnu-jar package — headless, no browser, no network) reports 0 errors over every built page against the HTML Living Standard; blocks on regression.
_gates.baseline: scripts/baseline-gate.mjs --check (conformance.yml) — stylelint-plugin-use-baseline maps the SHIPPED CSS to web-features Baseline data (headless, no browser). MEASURED "widely": every CSS feature is Baseline Widely Available. The two newer features (:has() in styles.css, ::selection in brand/css/base.css) are each guarded behind an @supports feature query, so they are progressive enhancements with a tested fallback rather than non-widely Baseline usage. The gate blocks on ANY drift from the committed status, so it cannot silently overclaim nor go stale.
